title: Dimension Fix (Some Forge Patches Ported)
description: Fixes dimensions all being removed when 1 gets removed.
body:
# Dimension Fix
This mod is a port of https://github.com/MinecraftForge/MinecraftForge/pull/7527 and https://github.com/MinecraftForge/MinecraftForge/pull/7599
Fix [MC-197860](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-197860): Deleting a custom dimension in a data pack deletes Nether and End.
